description: This pipeline processes folders and files by first retrieving a project user directory, then listing its subfolders and annotating them based on their names or paths. The annotated subfolders are further processed by listing their files, annotating these files, and filtering them according to certain criteria, resulting in a set of annotated and filtered files and folders.

eb872e43-2214-4902-b9a2-e540a3f3703e.name: path-to-annotation-simple
eb872e43-2214-4902-b9a2-e540a3f3703e.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

f9ad6726-a0ed-4982-852a-afb6e1af06cb.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.name: path-filter
dee7af1c-4ffa-4a54-b92f-8aaa9153d6b9.description: Filters the paths (files/folders) by their name or absolute path

afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.name: folder-list-files
afbae2e1-e93a-4b6c-96ff-d0acf23c7d32.description: Lists all files in the input folder
